units.content: Kuncheva & Whitaker (2003) defines canonical ensemble-diversity measures: Q-statistic, disagreement measure, double-fault, correlation, kappa, and six non-pairwise measures
All diversity measures in Kuncheva & Whitaker operate on agreement patterns over model outputs on a labelled dataset
Claim 8a operates on symmetric difference of architectural attribute sets of the models as entities
Claim 8a and Kuncheva & Whitaker occupy orthogonal input domains: output-agreement patterns versus architectural attribute sets
